species: Great Horned Owl pair at peak

theory_nodes.concept: THIRD STRIGIDAE ENTRY. Degrees 4 (Northern Spotted Owl, E=3), 299 (GHO territorial solo, E=6), 309 (GHO pair duet, E=9). Three Strigidae entries: specialist at E=3, solo generalist at E=6, pair generalist at E=9. The family's full energy range in three entries.
theory_nodes.description: Third Strigidae entry completing the family's energy range: E=3 to E=6 to E=9.

theory_nodes.concept: FROM E=6 TO E=9 IN TEN DEGREES. Degree 299: solo territorial call, counter-call from neighbor, multi-night negotiation, E=6. Degree 309: bonded pair simultaneous full-volume duet, peak December-January, E=9. Same species; categorically different acoustic event; +3 energy units.
theory_nodes.description: Within-species energy escalation: solo to pair duet produces +3 unit jump.

theory_nodes.concept: Bonded pair calling mechanics: coordinated timing (male fills gaps in female sequence), simultaneous peak at December-January maximum, mutual reinforcement exceeding solo call, reverse sexual dimorphism (female larger but higher-pitched). Combined 200-600 Hz frequency stack.
theory_nodes.description: Bonded pair acoustic mechanics producing E=9 from E=6 foundation.

theory_nodes.concept: E=9 SPS MAXIMUM. Second biological E=9 entry in the cluster (after Marten scream, 308). SPS at maximum for second consecutive degree. The ecology matches the Grunge Summit's opening energy. TAD + GHO pair = E=17 combined.
theory_nodes.description: Second E=9 SPS entry, sustaining maximum into the Grunge Summit opening.

cross_references.relationship: First Strigidae. Old-growth specialist, E=3. GHO pair at E=9 is the generalist maximum vs. the specialist minimum. Same family, opposite ecological and energy positions.
Same species. Solo call at E=6. Ten degrees later, pair duet at E=9. Within-species escalation from individual to bonded pair event.
Preceding E=9. First SPS maximum in the cluster. Marten scream (biological, old-growth) to GHO pair (biological, winter territory): consecutive E=9 biological events.

s36_pair.pairing_note: E=8 + E=9 = E=17. Two-guitar simultaneous heavy assault paired with two-owl simultaneous acoustic territorial claim. Both are dual-voice simultaneous events claiming territory through layered sound. Georgetown industrial south and winter forest peripheral intensity.
